name: Cannot find gift card after selling a new gift card and then voiding the ticket

steps.name: Given I am on the HOME page
When I clock in the timesheet with PIN "01"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('0', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('1', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
Then I should see the employee "Leon" in the employee list
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the "GIFT CARD" category
When I select the "GIFT CARD" category
Then I should see the "Gift Card $199.50" service
When I add the "Gift Card $199.50" service to my cart
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Activate Gift Card $199.50"
And I click on the "OK" button in the popup dialog
Then I should see the number card "0020" visible
Then I should see my cart showing 1 item added
Then I should see the service "Gift Card $199.50 (0020)" in my cart
When I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
When I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Close Ticket"
And I should see a popup dialog with content "CHANGE$0.00OK"
When I click on the "OK" button in the popup dialog
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
Given I am on the CLOSED_TICKETS page
When I wait for the page fully loaded
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the first ticket of payment "$199.50"
When I reopen to void ticket with payment amount "$199.50"

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$199.50' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Expect "toContainText" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$199.50' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Click locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$199.50' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'VOID TICKET', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'VOID TICKET', exact: true })

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'SELECT VOID REASON' }) }).or(locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'VOID TICKET' }) }))
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'SELECT VOID REASON' }) }).getByText('System Test', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#draggable-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: /confirm void/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /confirm/i })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#draggable-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: /confirm void/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /confirm/i })
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
And I should not see the employee "Leon" in the ticket list
When I delete ticket after void it with payment amount "199.50"
Given I am on the GIFT_CARD_BALANCE page
And I click on the "SEARCH" button
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see a popup dialog containing the title "ACTIVATE GIFT CARD"
And I should see the toast message "Can't find gift card." visible
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.MuiAlert-message').filter({ hasText: 'Can\'t find gift card.' })
